basicInfo.name: Cha Hae-In
basicInfo.flavor: Cha Hae-In was nicknamed \"The Dancer\" for her beautiful, dance-like movements when she wields her sword and slaughters scores of magic beasts before they even had the time to feel any pain.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 120% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: The Dancer
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 62% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 55% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Grants 2 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 72% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Sword Dance
Skill 2.desc:
4 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 62% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Self
 - Reduces the cooldown of [Sword Dance] by 60s upon defeating an enemy with damage from this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 75% of Physical Attack.
Transcend Lv.6 Effect
 - Self
 - Increases Effect: Resets the cooldown of [Sword Dance] upon defeating an enemy with damage from this skill.

Passive.name: Mana Detection
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Revives with 80% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - * Grants the following effects in Infinite Tower and Tower of Trials.
 - Grants Effect Probability Boost. [Always Active]
 - Reduces skill cooldowns by 15s upon using a skill 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Effect: HP gained upon revival becomes 100%.
 - Increases Effect: Effect Probability Boost to 32%.
Transcend Lv.2 Effect
 - All Allies
 - Adds Healing: Heals HP equal to 40% of the caster's Physical Attack upon using a skill 1 time(s).

transcendence.transcend_7: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_8: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_9: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_10: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_11: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.
transcendence.transcend_12: Increases All Attack, Defense, and HP by 2%.

profile.likes: Track and field, kendo, tteokbokki and other sweet-and-spicy foods
profile.story: Cha Hae-In was nicknamed \"The Dancer\" for her beautiful, dance-like movements when she wields her sword and slaughters scores of magic beasts before they even had the time to feel any pain.

basicInfo.name: Cha Hae-In
basicInfo.flavor: Cha Hae-In is the vice guild master of the Hunters Guild and the only female S-Rank hunter in all of Korea. She is widely considered to be the third most powerful hunter in the country after Sung Jinwoo and Go Gunhee.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: The Dancer
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 55% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - 55% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Allies
 - Grants 1 Debuff Removal(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 55% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Sword Dance
Skill 2.desc:
4 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 57% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Self
 - Reduces the cooldown of [Sword Dance] by 60s upon defeating an enemy with damage from this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 57% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Mana Detection
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Revives with 60% HP upon falling in battle. [Once per Battle]
 - All Allies
 - * Grants the following effects in Infinite Tower and Tower of Trials.
 - Grants Effect Probability Boost. [Always Active]
 - Reduces skill cooldowns by 13s upon using a skill 1 time(s).

profile.likes: Track and field, kendo, tteokbokki and other sweet-and-spicy foods
profile.story: Cha Hae-In is the vice guild master of the Hunters Guild and the only female S-Rank hunter in all of Korea. She is widely considered to be the third most powerful hunter in the country after Sung Jinwoo and Go Gunhee.

basicInfo.name: Cha Hae-In
basicInfo.flavor: Cha Hae-In is a swordsman-type hunter. She trains and studies under the C-Rank hunter, gumdo master Song Chiyul. She believes that rank has little to no bearing when it comes to learning aptitude, and that having a high hunter rank alone doesn't necessarily compensate for a lack of skill.

 - All Allies

Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 50% of Physical Attack.

4 Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 52% of Physical Attack 2 time(s).
 - Self
 - Reduces the cooldown of [Sword Dance] by 60s upon defeating an enemy with damage from this skill.
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 52% of Physical Attack.

Self

 - All Allies
 - * Grants the following effects in Infinite Tower and Tower of Trials.

 - Reduces skill cooldowns by 11s upon using a skill 1 time(s).

She believes that rank has little to no bearing when it comes to learning aptitude, and that having a high hunter rank alone doesn't necessarily compensate for a lack of skill.
